items.raw_excerpt: The administrative bulldozer rolled in the Kerala village of Bavla Illegal encroachments were removed from land worth crores, Ahmedabad Rural News
items.summary_en: The local administration in Bavla village, Gujarat, used a bulldozer to clear illegal encroachments. The removed structures were on land worth crores of rupees.
items.summary_ko: 구자라트주 바블라 마을 행정 당국이 불법 점유된 건물들을 불도저로 철거했다. 철거된 건물들은 수억 루피 상당의 토지 위에 세워져 있었다.
items.title_en: Bulldozer removes illegal buildings on valuable land in Bavla village
items.title_ko: 구자라트 바블라 마을, 불법 점유 건물 철거
items.title_original: The administrative bulldozer rolled in the Kerala village of Bavla Illegal encroachments were removed from land worth crores | Gujarat News - Sandesh

items.raw_excerpt: Two popular restaurants are now listed for sale publicly in this small Michigan town
items.summary_en: Two well-known restaurants in a small Michigan town have been put up for sale. The listings are public and draw attention from locals.
items.summary_ko: 미시간의 작은 마을에 있는 인기 레스토랑 2곳이 매물로 나왔습니다. 공개 매물로 등록되면서 지역 주민들의 관심을 받고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Two popular restaurants listed for sale in small Michigan town
items.title_ko: 미시간 작은 마을 인기 레스토랑 2곳 매물로 나와
items.title_original: Two popular restaurants are now listed for sale publicly in this small Michigan town - MLive.com
